author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tumblepop: Memories revealed for Nintendo Switch, a reimagining of Tumblepop

Play-Asia, Daewon Media Game Lab, and CRT Games today revealed Tumblepop: Memories, which is in development for Nintendo Switch. A release is planned for later in 2026. Tumblepop: Memories is a reimagining of the 1991 platformer Tumblepop. While preserving the classic experience, it will bring along new stages, modes, and features. Here’s an official overview: Developed by CRT Games and...

The post Tumblepop: Memories revealed for Nintendo Switch, a reimagining of Tumblepop appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream 1.0.2 update out now, patch notes

Nintendo just started distribution of a new version 1.0.2 update for Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream on Switch. This update is all about bug fixes. With some previous patch notes, Nintendo is cagey about the details. However, this time around, we actually have details about the various issues that have been addressed, and the list is fairly extensive. The full...

The post Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream 1.0.2 update out now, patch notes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Music – list of all games included

For those looking for a complete list of all games included and supported in Nintendo Music, that’s where this post comes in. Nintendo Music only came with a few songs at launch. However, since then, a few more have been added. Nintendo has also indicated that additional music is coming in the future. Currently it seems that we can expect...

The post Nintendo Music – list of all games included appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Crime scene investigation game Forensic M.E. Protocol to appear on Nintendo Switch

Forensic M.E. Protocol is in the works for Nintendo Switch, JanduSoft and K148 Game Studio have announced. It will be available on June 4, 2026. Forensic M.E. Protocol is a crime scene investigation game focused on forensic science rather than traditional detective work. You’ll play as an investigator tasked with reconstructing events across nine independent cases with self-contained stories. Expect...

The post Crime scene investigation game Forensic M.E. Protocol to appear on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Bloodshed set for Nintendo Switch physical release

Super Rare Games, Headup, and Com8com1 Software have announced a physical version of Bloodshed for Nintendo Switch. 3,000 standard copies will be available. Each unit includes the game, a full-color manual, exclusive sticker, and trading cards. At this time, there are no plans for a special edition. Bloodshed first came to the Nintendo eShop last October. Below is an official...

The post Bloodshed set for Nintendo Switch physical release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Zelda-like gourmet action adventure Angie Magica announced for Nintendo Switch

Mango Protocol, the developer behind MechaNika, Agatha Knife, and Clem, has announced Angie Magica for Nintendo Switch. The project is targeting a 2027 release. Angie Magica is a Zelda-like gourmet action adventure game. Players will wield the Wand of the Eternal Smile and learn recipes as they fulfill the prophecy and reclaim their place as the ultimate magical girl. Additional...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Goonect 2 coming to Nintendo Switch – from Bandai Namco’s indie game label Gyaar Studio and Phoenixx [update: release date]

March 16: Today, Bandai Namco Studios’ indie game label Gyaar Studio and publisher Phoenixx revealed Goonect 2 for Nintendo Switch. The title is planned for release this May. Goonect 2 is a two-player co-op action-adventure game. While the original never left Japan, it looks like we’re getting the sequel worldwide. Set off on a spirited journey through a vibrant 3D...

The post Goonect 2 coming to Nintendo Switch – from Bandai Namco’s indie game label Gyaar Studio and Phoenixx [update: release date] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
LEGO Zelda Great Deku Tree set being retired, here’s where you can get it

Various reports are indicating that the LEGO The Legend of Zelda Great Deku Tree is being retired. If you’ve yet to make a purchase, this could be your last chance to do so. As a reminder, the Great Deku Tree set pays homage to both Zelda: Ocarina of Time and Breath of the Wild. It comes with 2,500 pieces that...

The post LEGO Zelda Great Deku Tree set being retired, here’s where you can get it appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
LEGO 2K Drive to be delisted on Nintendo Switch, multiplayer servers shutting down

LEGO 2K Drive is on its way out with the game set to be delisted and its multiplayer servers going offline. You only have a few days left to buy the game. According to store listings, purchases are turning off on May 19, 2026. If you buy the title now, you’ll still be able to access it after the delisting...

The post LEGO 2K Drive to be delisted on Nintendo Switch, multiplayer servers shutting down appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Rumor: Nintendo finally returning to India with Switch 1 launch

According to a report from Day Zero Media, Nintendo is finally making a comeback in India. The company has largely been absent from the country in recent years. Although consoles have been available via the grey market, Nintendo itself hasn’t had an official presence. Dark Zero Media has heard from multiple sources that the original Nintendo Switch is finally launching...

The post Rumor: Nintendo finally returning to India with Switch 1 launch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:

text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book releases new “An Appetite for Discovery” trailer

Nintendo is back with another Yoshi and the Mysterious Book trailer, dubbed “An Appetite for Discovery”. This goes more into the game’s mechanics. The video shows how Yoshi can use different abilities to solve puzzles and progress. Here’s an overview of the game with more details: Join Yoshi for a new adventure in Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, coming exclusively...

The post Yoshi and the Mysterious Book releases new “An Appetite for Discovery” trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Midnight Swamp, a dark point-and-click adventure game, incoming for Nintendo Switch

As announced by Sometimes You, the company is putting Midnight Swamp on Nintendo Switch. The game is scheduled for May 29, 2026. Midnight Swamp is a dark point-and-click adventure game made by WildOmul. You’ll dive into a world of eerie fairy tales and take on the role of a tourist who must find a way out of a mysterious swamp....

The post Midnight Swamp, a dark point-and-click adventure game, incoming for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
